MOTION To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Larelei S. Paras, Esq. of The Chanler Group LLP, Tel. 510.848.8800, for plaintiff and moving party;
Rocky C. Tsai, Esq. of Ropes & Gray LLP, Tel. 415.315.6352, for defendant.

RULING: There being no objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the motion complies with the Health and Safety Code. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED. Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, e-mail: rhunter@sftc.org.
